calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-08-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and for a minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288
Petitioner Amiee Tran (mother) were present in pro per for self and as Guardian ad Litem for the minor Erik Alexis Tran.

Proof of Publication is in the file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Amiee Alexia Reyez.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to ErikAlexis Reyez.
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
